text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off, and I've decided to come and
watch an Umamusume pro wrestling trial lesson
that I saw advertised on a poster...

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. That's enough warming up. Next, we'll be
moving on to regular strength training. Ahem...
So, are you lot ready to get ripped?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
HELL YES! It's time to unleash our potencia total!
Isn't that right, Dober?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well... firstly, I'm not used to all this yelling... And
more importantly, how did I even end up here?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I seem to remember you asking me for a fun
way to spend your free time! So I simply brought
you somewhere fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes, I suppose I did ask... Still, I have to say,
Umamusume wrestlers sure are physically huge,
aren't they? They're a little intimidating.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No way, no way. Wrestlers do have bulky bods, but they also have muy bulky hearts! So you don't need to be afraid!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: C'mon! Let's do it together! Uno! Dos! Tres!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: F... Five! Six! Seven!

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yes, good effort! Can you keep going? For
wrestlers, squats are the most important exercise!
If you hang in there, then soon...

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You'll be able to do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The wrestler throws herself into the ring and
immediately performs a magnificent special
move, midair!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! W-wow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A finishing hold! Such a daring and climático
move! What do you think, Dober? Isn't wrestling
amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's actually pretty entertaining.

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Time for today's main event! It's time to
practice entering the ring with style! Who thinks
they can flaunt it like a real wrestler?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wow... Playing to the crowd like a real wrestler...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Here, here! How can we say no to that?! We'll be
the first to show our stuff!

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Stepping into the ring right now, it's the
undefeated lucha libre champion, El! The!
Greeeat!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: BRING IT OOOON!

text_block_list.name: Masked Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Next up! The ultimate weapon, born into a long
lineage of elite wrestlers—iiit's the Mighty Dober!
...Hm?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Dober, estás bien?! We're supposed to be
entering the ring together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't do it! Going in while everyone's
watching... There's just no way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Look... my heart's just not as strong as yours.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! You overestimate me! I'm not that
strong myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But this mask I wear gives me courage whenever I
need it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So, right now... I will share part of that courage
with you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hola, everyone! We are the ones you've been
waitin' for! The mighty tag team that needs no
introduction! Condorrr aaand Doberrr!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I am the phantom bird of the ring, El the Great!
I'll swoop in and steal your heart from above!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now the attention's on me! All you have to do... is
climb into the ring and boldly declare your
nombre!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-the... Mighty D-Dober!

text_block_list.name: Event Participants
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! El! Dober!
El! Doberrr!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I ended up in the spotlight anyway, but I guess
it was pretty fun once I gave it a try. I owe it to
you for taking the lead, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You can thank my mask for that, too! As
long as I have this mask, I can become the
greatest entertainer in the world, anytime!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All I did was share a minúscula portion of my
abundant courage! The rest was all you, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I guess that means you are to me what that
mask is to you.
